arts.ttl: Exclusive: Ryan Giggs on golf with Pep Guardiola, help from Manchester United and why he's back in the dugout
arts.sum: The Class of 92-owned Salford City head to Manchester City in the FA Cup on Saturday and Ryan Giggs spoke exclusively to the MEN about the game, their ownership of the Ammies and his own ambitions.

arts.ttl: I was working in a quarry, eating pies and gave up football at 20 - now I'm marking Erling Haaland
arts.sum: Salford City captain Curtis Tilt will try and stop Manchester City striker Erling Haaland this weekend, but his route to the Etihad has been interesting.

arts.ttl: Man City always expected me to fail - until Pep Guardiola changed my career
arts.sum: Manchester City host Salford in the FA Cup on Saturday, with few players representing both clubs due to the Ammies' rapid rise under the ownership of a group of Manchester United legends.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti famously forgot who I am - now I am looking to down Man City and Pep Guardiola

arts.ttl: Inside Salford City and how controversy-mired Ryan Giggs has become the most influential of Man United's Class of 92... but they're still losing £70k a week 10 years on
arts.sum: IAN HERBERT: The messages etched on the corridor walls at Salford City's modest little stadium convey the hope that old-fashioned values and sheer love of a place might bring football success.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola gets transfer wish granted as Man City kick January window into gear
arts.sum: Manchester City have struggled in the Premier League this season and it appears as though they are set to strengthen their side after a public appeal from boss Pep Guardiola
